title: artanthe scabriuscula
intro: Artanthe scabriuscula is a type of plant that belongs to the family Annonaceae, commonly known as the custard apple or soursop family. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its bioactive compounds such as alkaloids and flavonoids. The medicinal properties of Artanthe scabriuscula have been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of Artanthe scabriuscula are typically made from its leaves and stems, and can be consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
